market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Spacious 4-Bed Flat in Heart of the City
Charming Apartment for Rent in Popular Area
analysis.rewritten_desc: Located in the heart of the city, this 4-bedroom apartment offers a luxurious living experience for up to 4 guests. With a prime location, you'll be within walking distance to local shops, restaurants, and attractions. The apartment features a spacious living area, fully equipped kitchen, and 4 comfortable bedrooms, ideal for families or groups of friends. Enjoy the vibrant city life without the crowds, making this the perfect base for your stay.
analysis.photo_order_rec: The cover photo should feature the living area to showcase the apartment's spaciousness and luxury, which will appeal to potential guests seeking a comfortable stay.
key_diagnosis: Lowering the price to £146pn is a whopping -17% vs the cohort median of £175, resulting in significantly lower occupancy rates.
At 17.4%, the occupancy rate is almost 10% lower than the market median of 28.3%, indicating a clear room for improvement.
With zero listed amenities, the apartment appears bare, and guests may struggle to find essential services.
analysis.outreach_hook: By adjusting your pricing strategy to match the cohort median, you could potentially boost your occupancy rate by almost 10%—an estimated 73 more nights across the next 90 days.
